mapper.sql: h.household_id,h.household_no,h.head_person_id,p.name head_person_name,h.address,h.region_code,h.household_type,h.establish_date,h.status,h.version,h.created_at,h.updated_at,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM household_member mm WHERE mm.household_id=h.household_id AND mm.status='ACTIVE') active_member_count
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM household h LEFT JOIN person p ON p.person_id=h.head_person_id
SELECT FROM household h LEFT JOIN person p ON p.person_id=h.head_person_id ORDER BY ${orderBy} LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT FROM household h LEFT JOIN person p ON p.person_id=h.head_person_id WHERE h.household_id=#{id}
SELECT FROM household h LEFT JOIN person p ON p.person_id=h.head_person_id WHERE h.household_id=#{id} FOR UPDATE
SELECT * FROM person WHERE person_id=#{id} FOR UPDATE

SELECT m.*,p.name person_name,p.id_card,p.phone FROM household_member m JOIN person p ON p.person_id=m.person_id WHERE m.household_id=#{id} AND m.status='ACTIVE' ORDER BY CASE WHEN m.relationship='HEAD' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,m.member_id
SELECT m.*,p.name person_name,p.id_card,p.phone FROM household_member m JOIN person p ON p.person_id=m.person_id WHERE m.member_id=#{id} FOR UPDATE
SELECT m.*,p.name person_name,p.id_card,p.phone FROM household_member m JOIN person p ON p.person_id=m.person_id WHERE m.person_id=#{id} AND m.status='ACTIVE' FOR UPDATE
SELECT m.*,p.name person_name,p.id_card,p.phone FROM household_member m JOIN person p ON p.person_id=m.person_id WHERE m.household_id=#{id} AND m.status='ACTIVE' AND m.relationship='HEAD' FOR UPDATE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM household WHERE household_no=#{no}
mapper.update: UPDATE household SET address=#{address},region_code=#{regionCode},household_type=#{householdType},establish_date=#{establishDate},version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE household_id=#{householdId} AND status='ACTIVE' AND version=#{version}
UPDATE household_member SET relationship=#{relationship},version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE member_id=#{memberId} AND status='ACTIVE' AND version=#{version}
UPDATE household_member SET status='MOVED_OUT',leave_date=#{date},version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE member_id=#{id} AND status='ACTIVE' AND version=#{version}
UPDATE household_member SET relationship=#{relationship},version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE member_id=#{id} AND status='ACTIVE' AND version=#{version}
UPDATE household SET head_person_id=#{personId},version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE household_id=#{id} AND status='ACTIVE' AND version=#{version}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM residence WHERE person_id=#{personId}
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM migration_in WHERE person_id=#{personId})+(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM migration_out WHERE person_id=#{personId})
